core_reading: A repair-oriented state map was established inside the remyelination wedge
why_it_matters: This created the first internal basis for distinguishing more repair-compatible from less repair-compatible regions of the state space

core_reading: A dominant repair-compatible basin was identified as the strongest current internal repair-oriented reference
why_it_matters: This gave the project a stable internal anchor for state quality and later intervention-facing logic

core_reading: The system moved beyond a binary repair-vs-failure map and formalized review-like and boundary/frontier structure
why_it_matters: This made the state landscape more realistic and prevented naive interpretation of all movement as equally meaningful

core_reading: The project derived a minimal push-anchor-support architecture: Tspan2 push Ptprd anchor Aspa support
why_it_matters: This shifted the project from marker description toward explicit control logic

core_reading: A real rescue-vs-precision tradeoff was identified and formalized rather than hidden behind a fake single optimum
why_it_matters: This made the system more honest and more operationally useful

core_reading: The project now includes default_safe_stack balanced_analysis_stack boundary_probe_stack and maximum_rescue_probe_stack
why_it_matters: This created a disciplined multi-mode operating system instead of one oversimplified policy

core_reading: The controller and stack logic were brought back into a biology-facing reading
why_it_matters: This strengthened the scientific coherence of the system and linked formal structure to biological interpretation

core_reading: Dataset B provided promising first-pass external support and Dataset C provided supportive mixed triangulation
why_it_matters: This moved the project beyond an internal sandbox and gave the architecture a first serious external support layer

core_reading: The project now includes four intervention-facing programs derived from the architecture and state structure
why_it_matters: This shifted the project from interpretation alone toward organized intervention logic

core_reading: The system now includes a ranked order for what should be tested first and how signal should be interpreted
why_it_matters: This created an execution-facing layer rather than stopping at descriptive or conceptual outputs

core_reading: The wedge remains remyelination but the project now reads as a first computational wedge into neural state control
why_it_matters: This made the broader wedge-to-platform logic explicit without overclaiming full neural state control

core_reading: The project now includes reviewer-facing founder-facing application-tailored and Thiel-specific packaging
why_it_matters: This made the project legible and presentable across serious external audiences

core_reading: The current phase was formally closed as v1_strategically_complete
why_it_matters: This marked the project as coherent enough to use present and build from rather than endlessly polish

core_reading: The next real phase is experimental_validation_design
why_it_matters: This defines the highest-value future direction and keeps the project focused on real progression rather than narrative drift
